summary: The diff shows only a modification to project_state.json metadata file, which tracks the feature request but does not implement it. The actual requirement (REQ-1) to wrap the application root with TranslationProvider in frontend/src/main.tsx is completely missing from the implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Wrap the entire application root with TranslationProvider in frontend/src/main.tsx so that useTranslation hook can access the translation context throughout the component tree
missing_requirements.reason: No modifications were made to frontend/src/main.tsx. Only project_state.json metadata was updated. The actual code change to wrap the App component with TranslationProvider is not implemented.
